title: desmodium diffusum
intro: Desmodium diffusum, also known as tick trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Desmodium diffusum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. Desmodium diffusum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical paste or cream to treat various health issues.
